description.name: Riad Bab Doukkala
description.headline: Authentic 18th-century riad with plunge pool in the Marrakech medina
description.description: Hidden behind an unassuming wooden door in the heart of Marrakech's medina, Riad Bab Doukkala opens into a world of carved plasterwork, hand-painted Zellige tilework, and fragrant orange-blossom courtyards. Four individually decorated suites surround a central courtyard with a heated plunge pool and a shaded breakfast terrace. A dedicated staff member is on hand throughout your stay.

reviews: An absolute gem. The courtyard is magical, especially in the evening. Staff couldn't have been more helpful.
The most beautiful place I've ever stayed. Every corner is a work of art. Breakfast on the terrace was a highlight.
Perfect base for exploring the souks — everything is walking distance. The plunge pool was essential in the heat.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 21 days before check-in
policies.payment_schedule: 30% deposit on booking, remainder 21 days before arrival
